page_content:
Repeatable to: 9 credits.

EDHD798 Laboratory in Human Development (1-6 Credits) Independent research supervised by an instructor in a research setting. Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.

EDHD799 Master's Thesis Research (1-6 Credits) Registration required to the extent of six hours for master's thesis.

EDHD800 Seminar in Early Childhood Education (3 Credits) This seminar explores relevant current issues in early childhood development and education.
